title: zombie apocalypse [MAP]
description: Experience never seen zombie apocalypse  with guns for fabric
body:
**Zombie Apocalypse [MAP] Modpack for Fabric**  
*Bring the undead apocalypse to any custom map you choose.*

**Overview:**  
The *Zombie Apocalypse [MAP]* Modpack allows you to experience an intense, zombie-infested survival challenge on any custom map of your choice. Tailored for Fabric, this modpack offers optimized performance, immersive gameplay, and intense combat that can turn any world into a high-stakes zombie survival experience. Perfect for players looking to test their survival skills in new or user-created worlds.

 * Play a zombie apocalypse on any custom map of your choice! Perfect for users wanting to survive in custom environments, from cities to abandoned forts. **Note:** This version does not include a custom map, but here are some great maps you can try:
      * [*Open World Zombie Apocalypse*](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/open-world-zombie-apocalypse-survival/)
      * [*Amberlight MAP*](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/amberlight-city-v3-apocalypse/)
      * [*\[Mosslorn\] - Abandoned City Map*](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/mosslorn-1000x1000-custom-abandoned-city-map-with-loot-lore-and-hundreds-of-secrets-to-find/)
      * *or more on* [PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/projects/tag/apocalypse/)

**Features:**  
- **Choose Your Own Apocalypse:** Play in any custom map, from sprawling cities to haunted forests, for a unique survival experience every time.
- **Guns & Firearms:** Equip yourself with firearms essential for holding back zombie swarms. Conserve ammo wisely to maximize your survival.
- **Relentless Zombie Hordes:** Zombies spawn in large numbers, with smarter AI, making each encounter deadly. Staying mobile and prepared is key.
- **Performance-Optimized for Fabric:** Crafted to ensure smooth gameplay without sacrificing the intensity of the zombie apocalypse.

**Gameplay Tips:**  
- Use Guns strategically – bullets are limited, so make every shot count.
- Adapt your tactics based on the custom map’s layout and resources.
- Solo or co-op play both offer unique challenges; team up or test your individual skills.

**Note**: For an even more intense experience, download [Tissou's Zombie Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tissous-zombie-pack-optifine-1-7x-1-20/files/4750306) to add terrifying custom zombie textures (not included in this modpack). And enable all resourcepacks .

**Ideal for Custom Map Enthusiasts**  
This modpack is designed for those who want to experience a zombie apocalypse on their favorite custom maps. Whether you’re exploring a dense cityscape or a haunted woodland, *Zombie Apocalypse [MAP]* delivers a gripping, zombie-filled adventure.
